creator: dburr@pobox.com
text:
My secret spy satellite informs me that on 23-Sep-98, Thomas Gellekum
wrote:
> dburr@pobox.com writes:
> 
>> >Description:
>> 
>> The misc/rpm port complains of missing definitions:
>> 
>> 'RPMSIG_NONE' in file tools/rpmsignature.c
>> 'RPMSIG_HEADERSIG' in file checksig.c
>> 
>> Both of these definitions are found in the include file
>> "lib/signature.h",
>> so simply adding '#include "lib/signature.h"' to the affected files
>> fixed
>> the problem, and now everything compiles happily.
> 
> I can't reproduce this (2.2.7-stable, latest port, latest
> bsd.port.mk). For some reason you're probably missing the
> `-I<dir>/work/rpm-2.5.1/lib' from the compile line:

Bah.  You're right.  bsd.port.mk's been changing so often that I've
lost track.  After updating to the latest 'n greateset, this port
builds fine.  I'll be closing this PR now.  Thanks for your input!
---
